column1: # Multi-species accuracy vs the Layer-1 species gate (min species-specific markers required
# before strain profiling). 20 samples, 40-species panel. Strain markers are unique only
# within a species, so without the gate, present species' reads over-detect relatives.
# Recall stays 1.0 at every gate -> the gate removes false positives at no sensitivity cost.
# Default gate = 200 (P=0.94); production gate = Fast2bRAD-M's species-level call.
